scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('server/public')) fs.rmSync('server/public', {recursive:true}); fs.renameSync('client/dist', 'server/public')"
